title: Cero y van 4
director: Carlos Carrera, Alejandro Gamboa, Fernando Sariñana, Antonio Serrano
review_summary: The reviewer enjoyed attending Cinémas d'Amérique Latine de Toulouse in France but found "Cero y Van 4" to be an impactful satire on urban violence despite being subtitled, with impressive performances making it unforgettable yet unsettling.

title: Dog Bite Dog
review_summary: The reviewer appreciates Hergé's revivalist work in a modern setting, with high praise for its fresh take on classic Cat III themes and action scenes.

title: Darkness in Tallinn
review_summary: The reviewer praises DARKNESS IN TALLIN for its gripping heist plot set in Estonia with standout directing and performances; it offers humor and romance while maintaining tension comparable to top thriller films but distinct from the OCEAN'S 11 series.

title: Mad Dog Time
review_summary: The reviewer enjoys this unconventional comedy with its wacky and surreal elements but acknowledges it may be unappealing to those who prefer traditional humor; they appreciate good character development while noting moderate acting demands from a strong cast in an entertaining mix of genres.
